S.FORM: Vladimir Putin I 1952 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 7 a romi'ad masofoc ci Vladimir Putin, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Russia anini i ci Vladimir Putin, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 7 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: b~v…ĺa…¨~…ģimir po~u~utin i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i b~v…ĺa…¨~…ģimir po~u~utin, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ro~u~ussia anini i ¶i b~v…ĺa…¨~…ģimir po~u~utin, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Vladimir Putin I 1952 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 7 a romi'ad masofoc ci Vladimir Putin, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Russia anini i ci Vladimir Putin, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 7 a romi'ad.
